tasks.content: Created comprehensive test files for all atoms (60+), molecules (26), organisms (8), core files
Fixed key handling: Input, ExtensionInput, Loader, Terminal, many test key sequences
Fixed basic atom tests: Badge, Text, Box, ProgressBar, Toast, DynamicBorder, I18n export
Fixed molecule tests: extension-input, loader, countdown-timer, theme-selector, select-list, settings-list
Fixed keybinding mock consistency across tests (select-list, settings-list, tree-view, editor)
Remaining: organisms (editor, command-palette, context-menu), some atoms (markdown, diff, bash-msg, terminal-image, table, etc.), tui.test.ts
Potential improvements: align expectations with actual rendering, add missing methods (clearHistory), handle truncation/padding edge cases
Run full suite and achieve 100% passing
Fix remaining organism tests: Editor, CommandPalette, ContextMenu, LoginDialog, ThinkingSelector, FileBrowser
Fix remaining atom tests: Markdown, Diff, BashExecutionMessage, TerminalImage, Table, Autocomplete, Stepper, Grid
Fix molecule tests: MemoryPanel, SessionSelector, TreeSelector, ScopedModelsSelector, ModelSelector, OAuthSelector
Review and align all test expectations with implementation details
